openings.name: Modern Defense (c6 setup)
openings.moves: 1.e4 g6  2.d4 Bg7  3.Nc3 d6  4.f4 c6  5.Nf3 Bg4  6.Be3 Nd7  7.h3 Bxf3  8.Qxf3 e5  9.fxe5 dxe5  10.d5 Nc5
openings.plan: Fianchetto bishop, hold center, then strike with the ...e5 break — trade the light bishop and land the knight on c5 hitting e4.

openings.name: Englund Gambit
openings.moves: 1.d4 e5  2.dxe5 Nc6  3.Nf3 Qe7  4.Bf4 Qb4+  5.Bd2 Qxb2  6.Bc3 Bb4  7.Qd2 Bxc3  8.Qxc3 Qc1#
openings.plan: Force tactical chaos, target the b2/c3 weakness. If White gets greedy (6.Bc3?), the trap mates: ...Bb4, ...Bxc3, ...Qc1#.

openings.name: Colle–Zukertort System
openings.moves: 1.d4 d5  2.Nf3 Nf6  3.e3 e6  4.Bd3 c5  5.b3 Nc6  6.Bb2 Bd6  7.O-O O-O  8.Nbd2 b6  9.Ne5 Bb7  10.f4 Qc7
openings.plan: e3 + b3 + Bb2 fianchetto, dark bishop stays home (NO early Bf4). Castle, plant the knight on e5, then f4 and a kingside pawn storm / Bxh7 attack.

openings.name: Four Knights (Belgrade / Halloween)

lines.label: Halloween Gambit
lines.moves: 1.e4 e5  2.Nf3 Nc6  3.Nc3 Nf6  4.Nxe5 Nxe5  5.d4 Ng6  6.e5 Ng8  7.Bc4 d5  8.exd6 Bxd6

lines.label: Belgrade Gambit
lines.moves: 1.e4 e5  2.Nf3 Nc6  3.Nc3 Nf6  4.d4 exd4  5.Nd5 Nxd5  6.exd5 Qe7+  7.Be2 Nb4  8.O-O Nxd5

openings.plan: Develop both knights (Four Knights), then spring a gambit for bullet surprise. Halloween: 4.Nxe5 sacking a knight to roll the centre pawns. Belgrade: 4.d4 exd4 5.Nd5 for a fast initiative.

principles: Blunder check — 3 candidate moves before every move
10–15 tactics per day, accuracy over speed
Opening principles ≥ lines: center, development, castle
Review every loss — find the eval-flip move
One opening per side, played always
